title: MRSA Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
t infections. Antibiotic resistance happens when people don't use antibiotics in the right way. To prevent antibiotic resistance:
Take antibiotics as prescribed, making sure to finish the medicine even after you feel better. 
Don't use antibiotics if you don't have a bacterial infection. Antibiotics don't work on viral infections . 
Don't use antibiotics prescribed for someone else. 
Don't use old or leftover antibiotics. 
References 
Centers for Disease Control and Prevention [Internet]. Atlanta: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; About Antimicrobial Resistance; [reviewed 2022 Oct 5; cited 2023 Nov 8]; [about 2 screens]. Available from: https://www.cdc.gov/antimicrobial-resistance/about/ 
Centers for Disease Control and Prevention [Internet]. Atlanta: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) Basics; [reviewed 2019 Jun 26; cited 2023 Nov 8]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://www.cdc.gov/mrsa/about/
